title: Venezuelan Chicken Skewers
description: A tropical and flavorful dish from Venezuela, chicken skewers marinated in a mixture of spices and grilled to perfection.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together salt, tenderizer, and venezuelan seasoning.
2. Add the chicken to the marinade and mix until coated.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
5. Thread the marinated chicken onto the skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
6. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
7. Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
